steps.title: Find the decisive clue
steps.content: Critics drew similarities between film and traditional art forms to LEGITIMIZE film. This action directly implies changing how the public views, thinks about, or understands cinema.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Perception” directly fits the clue—perception is how someone views or understands something, which is exactly what critics would influence through drawing similarities. The other choices describe things not discussed: contributions to cinema, reproductions of cinema, or applications to cinema. That matches choice B — B is correct.
